segments.text: Just juggled Rob for so much damage here.
He was able to just get him quickly to over 100,
but Big Boss still getting a meaty, a beefy down air.

full_text: Just juggled Rob for so much damage here. He was able to just get him quickly to over 100, but Big Boss still getting a meaty, a beefy down air. Oh, my God. I want to confirm.
